contentBlocks.original:
नमामि नारायण पाद पंकजं
करोमि नारायण पूजनं सदा ।
वदामि नारायण नाम निर्मलं
स्मरामि नारायण तत्वमव्ययम् ।।
contentBlocks.transliteration:
namāmi nārāyaṇa pāda paṃkajaṃ
karomi nārāyaṇa pūjanaṃ sadā .
vadāmi nārāyaṇa nāma nirmalaṃ
smarāmi nārāyaṇa tatvamavyayam ..
contentBlocks.translation: I salute the lotus-feet of Narayana, always, propitiate Narayana, speak of the pure name of Narayana and bear in mind the immutable factuality of Narayana.
contentBlocks.meanings: नमामि (namāmi) – I salute; नारायण (nārāyaṇa) – Narayana; पाद (pāda) – feet; पंकजं (paṃkajaṃ) – lotus; करोमि (karomi) – I do; नारायण (nārāyaṇa) – Narayana; पूजनं (pūjanaṃ) – worship; सदा (sadā) – always; वदामि (vadāmi) – I speak; नारायण (nārāyaṇa) – Narayana; नाम (nāma) – name; निर्मलं (nirmalaṃ) – pure; स्मरामि (smarāmi) – I remember; नारायण (nārāyaṇa) – Narayana; तत्वमव्ययम् (tatvamavyayam) – immutable factuality (tatvam:factuality | avyayam:immutable);
